problem_summary: Example Cafe currently has no website and no Google Business listing, making the business entirely absent from the online channels that tourists and locals in Westport use to find somewhere to eat. For a hospitality business in a tourist-active town, this means there is no way for potential customers to view the menu, confirm opening hours, or get directions before deciding to visit. Establishing a mobile-first website and a fully optimised Google Business Profile would create a complete online foundation from which the business can begin capturing local and visitor search traffic.
recommended_solution: A hospitality starter package covering Google Business Profile setup as an immediate first step, followed by a four-page mobile-first website build including homepage, menu, contact with click-to-call, and location page, with on-page local SEO, SSL, and EU-based hosting included as standard.
scope_of_work: Set up and fully optimise a Google Business Profile for Example Cafe, including business address, opening hours, phone number, category, and photos, delivered as an immediate standalone first step prior to the website launch.

Build a four-page mobile-first website covering homepage with prominent opening hours and location, menu page, contact page with click-to-call button, and a location and directions page with embedded map, built to target a mobile PageSpeed score of 75 or above from launch.

Implement on-page local SEO from launch including location-targeted page titles and meta descriptions referencing Westport and Co. Mayo, plus LocalBusiness schema markup, with SSL and EU-based hosting configured as standard.
expected_outcomes: A fully optimised Google Business Profile should improve the visibility of Example Cafe in Google Maps and local search results, making the business discoverable to visitors and locals searching in and around Westport.

A mobile-first website with clearly displayed opening hours, menu, and click-to-call functionality is likely to reduce friction for new customers and support more confident decisions to visit, particularly among tourists searching on mobile devices.

On-page local SEO and LocalBusiness schema markup implemented at launch should give the site a stronger foundation for appearing in location-based search results from the outset, reducing the need for significant remedial SEO work later.
next_steps: Schedule a 15 to 20 minute call to confirm key business details such as opening hours, menu format, and any existing social media accounts, and to walk through what the Google Business Profile and website would look like in practice for Example Cafe.
risks_if_delayed: Each week without a Google Business Profile or website is a week during which tourists and locals searching online in Westport have no way to find Example Cafe, with that search interest defaulting to businesses that do appear in results. With the peak tourist season in the west of Ireland a recurring commercial window, establishing an online presence sooner rather than later maximises the number of visitor searches the business is able to benefit from.
